RmlxStats 0.2.0
  • Reference
    • Benchmarks
  • Changelog

Package index

Linear Models

mlxs_lm()
MLX-backed linear regression
mlxs_lm_fit()
Fit an MLX linear model from design matrices
coef(<mlxs_lm>) predict(<mlxs_lm>) fitted(<mlxs_lm>) residuals(<mlxs_lm>) vcov(<mlxs_lm>) confint(<mlxs_lm>) anova(<mlxs_lm>) as.data.frame(<mlxs_anova>) print(<mlxs_anova>) tidy(<mlxs_anova>) summary(<mlxs_lm>) print(<mlxs_lm>) print(<summary.mlxs_lm>) update(<mlxs_lm>) model.frame(<mlxs_lm>) model.matrix(<mlxs_lm>) terms(<mlxs_lm>) nobs(<mlxs_lm>) tidy(<mlxs_lm>) glance(<mlxs_lm>) augment(<mlxs_lm>)
mlxs_lm method utilities

Generalized Linear Models

mlxs_glm()
MLX-backed generalized linear model
coef(<mlxs_glm>) predict(<mlxs_glm>) fitted(<mlxs_glm>) residuals(<mlxs_glm>) vcov(<mlxs_glm>) print(<mlxs_glm>) summary(<mlxs_glm>) print(<summary.mlxs_glm>) anova(<mlxs_glm>) model.frame(<mlxs_glm>) model.matrix(<mlxs_glm>) terms(<mlxs_glm>) nobs(<mlxs_glm>) tidy(<mlxs_glm>) glance(<mlxs_glm>) augment(<mlxs_glm>)
mlxs_glm method utilities

Elastic Net Models

mlxs_glmnet()
MLX-backed elastic net regression
mlxs_cv_glmnet()
Cross-validated MLX elastic net regression

Dimensionality Reduction

mlxs_prcomp()
MLX-backed principal components analysis
predict(<mlxs_prcomp>) print(<mlxs_prcomp>) summary(<mlxs_prcomp>) plot(<mlxs_prcomp>) biplot(<mlxs_prcomp>) nobs(<mlxs_prcomp>) tidy(<mlxs_prcomp>) augment(<mlxs_prcomp>)
PCA methods for mlxs_prcomp

Bootstrapping

mlxs_boot()
Bootstrap MLX arrays along the first dimension

Family Functions

mlxs_gaussian()
MLX-friendly Gaussian family
mlxs_binomial()
MLX-friendly binomial family
mlxs_poisson()
MLX-friendly Poisson family
mlxs_quasibinomial()
MLX-friendly quasibinomial family
mlxs_quasipoisson()
MLX-friendly quasipoisson family
tidy() glance() augment()
Re-export generics
